title: I hear the words of love
firstLine: I hear the words of love,
publicDomainBasis: Horatius Bonar (1808–1889), Genevan Psalter. All public domain.

sections.label: Verse 1
sections.text:
I hear the words of love,
I gaze upon the blood,
I see the mighty sacrifice,
And I have peace with God.

sections.label: Verse 2
sections.text:
’Tis everlasting peace!
Sure as Jehovah’s Name,
’Tis stable as His steadfast throne,
For evermore the same.

sections.label: Verse 3
sections.text:
The clouds may go and come,
And storms may sweep my sky;
This blood-sealed friendship changes not,
The Cross is ever nigh.

sections.label: Verse 4
sections.text:
My love is ofttimes low,
My joy still ebbs and flows,
But peace with Him remains the same,
No change my Savior knows.

sections.label: Verse 5
Verse 6
sections.text:
The Cross still stands unchanged,
Though heaven is now His home;
The mighty stone is rolled away,
But yonder is His tomb!

sections.label: Verse 7
sections.text:
And yonder is my peace,
The grave of all my woes!
I know the Son of God has come,
I know He died and rose.

sections.label: Verse 8
sections.text:
I know He liveth now
At God’s right hand above;
I know the throne on which He sits,
I know His truth and love!
